# Clarity Voice

> Clarity Voice is an AI voice calling platform that confirms cash-on-delivery (COD) orders before dispatch, reducing RTO (return-to-origin) and failed deliveries for Indian D2C and e-commerce sellers.

## What Clarity Voice does
Clarity Voice places automated AI voice calls to customers who placed a cash-on-delivery order, confirming the order details and delivery address before the item is shipped. This catches wrong numbers, changed minds, and incorrect addresses before a courier is dispatched, directly reducing RTO and reverse-logistics costs for online sellers.

## Who it's for
Indian D2C brands and e-commerce sellers who offer cash-on-delivery and want to reduce failed deliveries without hiring or scaling a manual calling team.

## Key facts
- Pricing: pay-as-you-go from ₹3.99 per minute, with monthly and annual plans available.
- Languages supported: English, Hindi, with additional Indian languages (Bengali, Kannada, Malayalam, Gujarati) and Mandarin, Arabic.
- Core use case: pre-dispatch COD order confirmation calls.
